title: Collapse all folders

posts.author: PeterHiebert99 (Peter Hiebert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have all folders collapsed by default

Hey Monday.com team,

I am a frequent user of your platform and I find it very helpful for organizing my work. However, I would like to suggest a new feature that would make it even more efficient for me and other users like me.

My request is for an option to have all folders collapsed by default when I open a Monday board. Currently, when I log in, all folders are expanded, which can be overwhelming and time-consuming to navigate. I believe this feature would be particularly useful for users who have a large number of boards, folders and docs.

Ideally, this feature would be customizable, allowing users to choose whether they want all folders collapsed or expanded by default. It could be implemented as a toggle switch or a setting in the user preferences.

I believe this feature would improve the user experience for many Monday.com users, and I hope you will consider adding it to your platform in a future update. Thank you for your consideration and for providing such a great tool for project management.

posts.author: ingridbee (Ingrid Berendt)
posts.cookedHtml: Love this idea. Want to build on it and ask for a keyboard shortcut that toggles expand/collapse folders as well.

posts.author: cass.m.carr (Cass Carr)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes this would be fantastic. Hoping this feature will be available soon.

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu (Mihai Oprisenescu)
posts.cookedHtml: You can use the CTRL+G to colapse/expand all folders.

posts.author: PeterHiebert99 (Peter Hiebert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mihai, thanks for your comment.

But it seems that CTRL+G actually collapses/expands all groups in a board, and not the folders.

posts.author: Chfraym (Christian)
posts.cookedHtml: What browser are you using? It doesn’t seem to work for me

posts.author: adepaul (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looks like we have that! Open the side menu with expanded folders, right click and click on collapse all folders.
Thanks Monday for listening! This has been a pain point for a while.

posts.author: kirst (Kirst)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think Peter was asking for a default setting specifically - which is also what I would like to see! With the current solution, every time you move to a new workplace, the folders are default to being expanded. Then you have to go to the workspace setting and collapse the folders manually. It’s a real annoyance when you’re working across multiple workspaces.

It would be a lot better to have a setting that you can toggle once and set the default folder view to collapse. Does this exist? Am I just missing something?

posts.author: Andoni00 (Andoni)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to bump this up as well. While the current workaround allows you to collapse all folders with one click, you have to do this every time you open up the workspace. I’d like to see a feature that allows to have all folders collapsed by default, even if this is only available to workspace admins. This could be something similar to what exists in other tools like SharePoint.
